description_long: This is a vintage-style gramophone record player featuring a large, flared brass horn with a reflective golden finish, mounted on a wooden base. The base is rectangular and crafted from dark-stained wood, with decorative paneling and a small metallic emblem on the front. A circular black turntable platter sits atop the base, holding a vinyl record with a blue label at its center. The tonearm, made of metal with ornate detailing, extends from the side and is positioned over the record. No modern control knobs or dust cover are visible, emphasizing its classic, mechanical design. The overall appearance is elegant and nostalgic, reminiscent of early 20th-century audio equipment.
description: A vintage gramophone with a large golden horn, wooden base, and visible turntable platter holding a vinyl record. The ornate tonearm and absence of modern controls highlight its classic design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full brass horn, wooden base with a decorative emblem, and the turntable platter with a vinyl record clearly visible.
description_view_1: The side view is dominated by the wide opening of the horn, obscuring most of the base and platter, with the tonearm partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the horn and the tonearm's attachment, with the turntable platter and record still visible but less prominent.
description_view_3: The opposite side view highlights the tonearm's ornate structure and its position over the record, with the horn extending outward.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present and circular, occupying a central position on the wooden base. It is black with visible grooves and holds a vinyl record with a blue label. The platter appears to be made of metal or hard plastic, with a matte finish and subtle texturing.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and ornately designed, extending from the right side of the base and positioned over the platter. It is medium in length, with visible joints and a classic mechanical appearance, finished in a dark metallic color.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is not clearly visible, but its presence is implied at the end of the tonearm where it meets the record.
